title: sql.execute params
description: Parameters for the sql.execute RPC method

sql.description: SQL statement to execute (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MERGE, WITH). Hard ceiling 1 MiB; the negotiated transport payload limit may be lower.

params.description: Named parameters for the SQL statement (e.g. { "id": 1 }). Current runtime supports up to 5 named parameters per command.

client_token.description: Opaque token (hex) or JWT for authorization. Required when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for request deduplication. When enableSocketIdempotency is active, duplicate keys return cached response (TTL 5min). Reusing the same key with a different request payload is rejected.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum ODBC execution time in milliseconds. Effective timeout is the minimum between this value and any active internal stage budget.

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return

page.description: 1-based page number for paginated SELECT execution

page_size.description: Maximum number of rows to return for the current page

cursor.description: Opaque continuation cursor returned in result.pagination.next_cursor

execution_mode.description: SQL handling mode. managed lets the agent rewrite SQL for managed pagination when requested. preserve executes the SQL exactly as sent and disables managed pagination rewriting.

preserve_sql.description: Deprecated alias for execution_mode=preserve. When true, the agent executes the SQL as sent and disables managed SQL pagination rewriting. Cannot be combined with page, page_size, or cursor.

multi_result.description: Enables multi-result execution for SQL scripts or procedures that can return multiple result sets. Cannot be combined with pagination or named parameters.

database.description: Optional target database override for this request
